_meta.name: malformed_extraction
_meta.description: Invoice where grand_total field is physically absent from the document. Expected outcome: ExtractionFailure / NEEDS_REEXTRACTION. The system must never fabricate the total (FR-1.3).

invoice_text:

456 Finance Street, Metropolis

Line Items:
-----------
1. Bolt Assembly M8   Qty: 100   Unit Price: $1.25   Amount: $125.00

Subtotal:  $125.00
Tax (10%):  $12.50
[TOTAL FIELD INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — malformed document test]

Payment instructions to follow.
